title: feat: allowlist smplstuff for community models
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
Adds GitHub ID `206557620` (`smplstuff`) to the community model owner allowlist.

- Verified: registered on enter.pollinations.ai (tier `flower`, github_id matches), active contributor with app submissions #11685, #8561, #2066.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Welcome to the Model Garden, smplstuff
gist.blurb: Community member smplstuff has been added to the model owner allowlist. We can't wait to see what new models they bring to the hive!
gist.summary: Added GitHub user smplstuff (ID 206557620) to the community model owner allowlist.
gist.impact: This grants smplstuff the ability to host and share their own custom models through the pollinations.ai platform.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee welcoming a new contributor to the model garden, handing them a glowing seed or badge. Represents granting access to a community member.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee handing a glowing digital seed to a new friend in a lush digital garden. A fresh code-plant sprouts from a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot nearby. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, welcoming vibes.
